chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-2066 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Office Objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 24.09.2025. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali, Advocate for the Petitioner. ----- Learned counsel for the Petitioner states that the Petitioner is not in contact with him and pleads no instructions. Under the given circumstances, the instant Petition stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
